personal.name: Paul
personal.tagline: I don't just write code — I understand the problem first, then build the cleanest solution to fix it.
personal.bio: I'm a developer who thinks before he types. I dig into the actual problem, figure out where it really lives, then build something clean and lasting. No cargo-culting, no over-engineering — just software that works and makes sense six months later.

projects.title: Project One
projects.description: A description of your first project. What does it do? What problem does it solve? What makes it interesting?

projects.title: Project Two
projects.description: Highlight the technical challenges you overcame or the impact this project had on real users.

projects.title: Project Three
projects.description: Keep the description concise but compelling — what would make someone want to click through and explore?

projects.title: Project Four
projects.description: A fourth project showcasing a different skillset or a different type of work you've done.
